sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n114700" key="xrhstologi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χρηστο-λογία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n114700.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fair speaking,</tr_> in bad sense, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg006.perseus-grc1:16:18" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Ep.Rom.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">16.18</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
